sessionId.documentation: The identifier of the code interpreter session.

lastUpdatedAt.documentation: The timestamp when the code interpreter session was last updated.

runtimeSessionId.documentation: The ID of the session that you want to stop.

agentRuntimeArn.documentation: The ARN of the agent that contains the session that you want to stop.

qualifier.documentation: Optional qualifier to specify an agent alias, such as prodcode> or dev. If you don't provide a value, the DEFAULT alias is used.

clientToken.documentation: Idempotent token used to identify the request. If you use the same token with multiple requests, the same response is returned. Use ClientToken to prevent the same request from being processed more than once.

runtimeSessionId.documentation: The ID of the session that you requested to stop.

statusCode.documentation: The status code of the request to stop the session.

StreamUpdate.documentation: Contains information about an update to a stream.

requestPath.documentation: The path of the Stripe Privy API request.

requestBody.documentation: Request body JSON for the Privy API call

authorizationSignature.documentation: Base64-encoded ECDSA P-256 authorization signature (only present when includeAuthorizationSignature is true)

requestExpiry.documentation: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the authorization signature expires. Set as privy-request-expiry header.

appId.documentation: The Privy app ID for the privy-app-id header

basicAuthToken.documentation: Base64-encoded Basic Auth token (appId:appSecret) for the Authorization header

StripePrivyTokenResponseOutput.documentation: StripePrivy token response containing appId, basicAuthToken, and optionally authorizationSignature

configurationBundle.documentation: The system prompt sourced from a configuration bundle version.

SystemPromptConfig.documentation: The system prompt input, either as inline text or from a configuration bundle.

bundleArn.documentation: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the configuration bundle.

versionId.documentation: The version identifier of the configuration bundle.

systemPromptJsonPath.documentation: The JSON path within the configuration bundle that contains the system prompt.

SystemPromptConfigurationBundle.documentation: A system prompt sourced from a configuration bundle version.

agentTraces.documentation: The agent traces to analyze for generating recommendations.

evaluationConfig.documentation: The evaluation configuration specifying which evaluator to use for assessing recommendation quality.

SystemPromptRecommendationConfig.documentation: Configuration for generating system prompt optimization recommendations.

recommendedSystemPrompt.documentation: The optimized system prompt text generated by the recommendation.

configurationBundle.documentation: The configuration bundle containing the recommended system prompt, if the input was sourced from a configuration bundle.

errorCode.documentation: The error code if the recommendation failed.

errorMessage.documentation: The error message if the recommendation failed.

SystemPromptRecommendationResult.documentation: The result of a system prompt recommendation, containing the optimized prompt.

name.documentation: The name of the gateway target.

ThrottledException.documentation: The request was denied due to request throttling. Reduce the frequency of requests and try again.

ThrottlingException.documentation: The exception that occurs when the request was denied due to request throttling. This happens when you exceed the allowed request rate for an operation. Reduce the frequency of requests or implement exponential backoff retry logic in your application.

amount.documentation: Raw balance in the smallest denomination (e.g., USDC base units where 1 USDC = 1000000).

decimals.documentation: Number of decimal places for the token (e.g., 6 for USDC).

inputTokens.documentation: The number of tokens consumed for input processing during the evaluation. Includes tokens from the evaluation prompt, agent traces, and any additional context provided to the evaluator model.

outputTokens.documentation: The number of tokens generated by the evaluator model in its response. Includes tokens for the score, explanation, and any additional output produced during the evaluation process.

totalTokens.documentation: The total number of tokens consumed during the evaluation, calculated as the sum of input and output tokens. Used for cost calculation and rate limiting within the service limits.

TokenUsage.documentation: The token consumption statistics for language model operations during evaluation. Provides detailed breakdown of input, output, and total tokens used for cost tracking and performance monitoring.

code.documentation: The code to execute in a code interpreter session. This is the source code in the specified programming language that will be executed by the code interpreter.

language.documentation: The programming language of the code to execute. This tells the code interpreter which language runtime to use for execution.

clearContext.documentation: Whether to clear the context for the tool.

command.documentation: The command to execute with the tool.

directoryPath.documentation: The directory path for the tool operation.

taskId.documentation: The identifier of the task for the tool operation.

runtime.documentation: The runtime environment to use for code execution. If not specified, defaults to deno for JavaScript and TypeScript.

ToolArguments.documentation: The collection of arguments that specify the operation to perform and its parameters when invoking a tool in Amazon Bedrock AgentCore. Different tools require different arguments, and this structure provides a flexible way to pass the appropriate arguments to each tool type.

bundleArn.documentation: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the configuration bundle.

versionId.documentation: The version identifier of the configuration bundle.

tools.documentation: The list of tool entries mapping tool names to their JSON paths within the bundle.

ToolDescriptionConfigurationBundle.documentation: Tool descriptions sourced from a configuration bundle version.

toolDescription.documentation: The current description of the tool to optimize.

ToolDescriptionInput.documentation: A tool description input containing the tool name and its current description.

recommendedToolDescription.documentation: The optimized tool description text generated by the recommendation.

ToolDescriptionOutput.documentation: The output for a single tool description recommendation.

agentTraces.documentation: The agent traces to analyze for generating tool description recommendations.

ToolDescriptionRecommendationConfig.documentation: Configuration for generating tool description optimization recommendations.

tools.documentation: The list of tools with their recommended descriptions.

configurationBundle.documentation: The configuration bundle containing the recommended tool descriptions, if the input was sourced from a configuration bundle.

errorCode.documentation: The error code if the recommendation failed.

errorMessage.documentation: The error message if the recommendation failed.

ToolDescriptionRecommendationResult.documentation: The result of a tool description recommendation, containing optimized descriptions.

configurationBundle.documentation: Tool descriptions sourced from a configuration bundle version.

ToolDescriptionSource.documentation: The source of tool descriptions, either inline text or from a configuration bundle.

tools.documentation: The list of tool descriptions to optimize.

ToolDescriptionTextInput.documentation: Inline tool description input containing a list of tools.

taskId.documentation: The identifier of the task that produced the result.

taskStatus.documentation: The status of the task that produced the result.

stdout.documentation: The standard output from the tool execution.

stderr.documentation: The standard error output from the tool execution.

exitCode.documentation: The exit code from the tool execution.

executionTime.documentation: The execution time of the tool operation in milliseconds.

ToolResultStructuredContent.documentation: Contains structured content from a tool result.

protocolVersion.documentation: The MCP protocol version that the tools conform to. This differs from the schemaVersion field in the server definition, which identifies the server configuration schema format.

inlineContent.documentation: The inline content of the tools definition.

ToolsDefinition.documentation: The MCP tools definition with a protocol version and inline content. The protocolVersion identifies the MCP protocol version that the tools conform to. This differs from schemaVersion in the server definition, which identifies the server configuration schema format.

UnauthorizedException.documentation: This exception is thrown when the JWT bearer token is invalid or not found for OAuth bearer token based access

abTestId.documentation: The unique identifier of the A/B test to update.

clientToken.documentation: A unique, case-sensitive identifier to ensure that the API request completes no more than one time. If this token matches a previous request, the service ignores the request, but does not return an error.

name.documentation: The updated name of the A/B test.

description.documentation: The updated description of the A/B test.

executionStatus.documentation: The updated execution status to enable or disable the A/B test.

abTestId.documentation: The unique identifier of the updated A/B test.

abTestArn.documentation: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the updated A/B test.

status.documentation: The status of the A/B test.

executionStatus.documentation: The execution status of the A/B test.

updatedAt.documentation: The timestamp when the A/B test was updated.

sessionId.documentation: The identifier of the browser session.

streamUpdate.documentation: The update to apply to the browser stream.

clientToken.documentation: A unique, case-sensitive identifier to ensure that the operation completes no more than one time. If this token matches a previous request, Amazon Bedrock ignores the request, but does not return an error.

sessionId.documentation: The identifier of the browser session.

updatedAt.documentation: The time at which the browser stream was updated.

userToken.documentation: The OAuth2.0 token issued by the user’s identity provider that was used to generate the workload access token

userId.documentation: The ID of the user for whom you have retrieved a workload access token for

UserIdentifier.documentation: The OAuth2.0 token or user ID that was used to generate the workload access token used for initiating the user authorization flow to retrieve OAuth2.0 tokens.

ValidationException.documentation: The exception that occurs when the input fails to satisfy the constraints specified by the service. Check the error message for details about which input parameter is invalid and correct your request.

name.documentation: The name of the field.

message.documentation: A message describing why this field failed validation.

ValidationExceptionField.documentation: Stores information about a field passed inside a request that resulted in an exception.

name.documentation: The name of the variant. Must be C for control or T1 for treatment.

weight.documentation: The percentage of traffic to route to this variant. Weights across all variants must sum to 100.

variantConfiguration.documentation: The configuration for this variant, including the configuration bundle or target reference.

Variant.documentation: A variant in an A/B test, representing either the control (C) or treatment (T1) configuration.

configurationBundle.documentation: A reference to a configuration bundle version to use for this variant.

target.documentation: A reference to a gateway target to route traffic to for this variant.

VariantConfiguration.documentation: The configuration for an A/B test variant.

sampleSize.documentation: The number of sessions evaluated for this variant.

mean.documentation: The mean evaluation score for this variant.

absoluteChange.documentation: The absolute change in mean score compared to the control variant.

percentChange.documentation: The percentage change in mean score compared to the control variant.

pValue.documentation: The p-value indicating the statistical significance of the observed difference.

confidenceInterval.documentation: The confidence interval for the observed difference.

isSignificant.documentation: Whether the observed difference is statistically significant.

VariantResult.documentation: Statistical results for a treatment variant compared against the control.

width.documentation: The width of the viewport in pixels. This value determines the horizontal dimension of the visible area. Valid values range from 800 to 1920 pixels.

height.documentation: The height of the viewport in pixels. This value determines the vertical dimension of the visible area. Valid values range from 600 to 1080 pixels.

ViewPort.documentation: The configuration that defines the dimensions of a browser viewport in a browser session. The viewport determines the visible area of web content and affects how web pages are rendered and displayed. Proper viewport configuration ensures that web content is displayed correctly for the agent's browsing tasks.

documentation: Welcome to the Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Data Plane API reference. Data Plane actions process and handle data or workloads within Amazon Web Services services.
